info.name: Sentiment Analyzer - Full Test Suite
info.description: Comprehensive API test suite for the Sentiment Analyzer application. Tests all endpoints with validation, error cases, and performance checks.

item.name: 00 - Setup & Health
item.description: Initial health check and environment setup

request.description:
Verify backend server is running and all services are accessible.

**Expected Response:** 200 OK with service health status

exec: pm.test('Health check response has status field', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData).to.have.property('status'); pm.expect(jsonData.status).to.equal('healthy'); });

pm.test('Services object has required fields', function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(jsonData.services).to.have.all.keys('coingecko', 'newsapi', 'claude_api'); pm.expect(['ok', 'misconfigured']).to.include(jsonData.services.claude_api); pm.expect(['ok', 'misconfigured']).to.include(jsonData.services.newsapi); });

item.name: 01 - Coins List Endpoint
item.description: Test GET /api/coins with various parameters and scenarios

request.description: Fetch top 50 coins with sentiment analysis.

exec: pm.test('Response has data array, count, and last_updated', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('data'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('count'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.data)).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Coins have required fields including sentiment', function () { var coin = pm.response.json().data[0]; var required = ['symbol', 'name', 'price_usd', 'sentiment_score', 'sentiment_confidence', 'volatility_24h']; required.forEach(function(field) { pm.expect(coin).to.have.property(field); }); });

pm.test('Valid sentiment scores (BULL/NEUTRAL/BEAR)', function () { var validScores = ['BULL', 'NEUTRAL', 'BEAR']; pm.response.json().data.forEach(function(coin) { pm.expect(validScores).to.include(coin.sentiment_score); pm.expect(coin.sentiment_confidence).to.be.within(0, 1); }); });

request.description: Test limit parameter
Test volatility sorting

exec: pm.test('Coins sorted by volatility descending', function () { var coins = pm.response.json().data; for (var i = 0; i < coins.length - 1; i++) { pm.expect(coins[i].volatility_24h).to.be.greaterThanOrEqual(coins[i + 1].volatility_24h); } })

request.description: Test sentiment sorting (BULL > NEUTRAL > BEAR)

exec: pm.test('Sorted by sentiment BULL > NEUTRAL > BEAR', function () { var order = {BULL: 0, NEUTRAL: 1, BEAR: 2}; var coins = pm.response.json().data; for (var i = 0; i < coins.length - 1; i++) { var curr = order[coins[i].sentiment_score]; var next = order[coins[i + 1].sentiment_score]; if (curr === next) { pm.expect(coins[i].sentiment_confidence).to.be.greaterThanOrEqual(coins[i + 1].sentiment_confidence); } else { pm.expect(curr).to.be.lessThanOrEqual(next); } } })

item.name: 02 - Coin Detail Endpoint
item.description: Test GET /api/coins/:symbol for detailed coin information

request.description: Fetch detailed coin info with price history and headlines

exec: pm.test('Response has coin, price_history, headlines, sentiment_today', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.all.keys('coin', 'price_history', 'sentiment_today', 'headlines', 'news_count'); });

pm.test('Price history is array with OHLCV data', function () { var history = pm.response.json().price_history; pm.expect(Array.isArray(history)).to.be.true; pm.expect(history.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); var point = history[0]; pm.expect(point).to.have.all.keys('timestamp', 'open', 'high', 'low', 'close'); });
pm.test('Headlines is array of strings', function () { pm.response.json().headlines.forEach(function(h) { pm.expect(h).to.be.a('string'); }); });

request.description: Test custom days parameter

exec: pm.test('Returns history for requested days', function () { var history = pm.response.json().price_history; pm.expect(history.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); pm.expect(history.length).to.be.lessThanOrEqual(14); })

request.description: Test error handling for invalid symbol

exec: pm.test('Returns 404 for invalid symbol', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('Error response contains error message', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().error).to.be.a('string'); })

request.description: Get cached sentiment (read-only, no analysis triggered)

exec: pm.test('Status is 200 (cached) or 404 (not cached)', function () { pm.expect([200, 404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Sentiment has required fields', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.all.keys('symbol', 'analysis_date', 'sentiment_score', 'confidence', 'summary', 'key_catalysts', 'risk_factors', 'short_term_outlook', 'volatility_warning', 'trending_score'); }); } // 404 is expected if not yet analyzed

request.description: Test auth - request without API key
Trigger sentiment analysis with valid auth

exec: pm.test('Response has job_id, status, and coins_to_process', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.all.keys('job_id', 'status', 'coins_to_process'); });

request.description: Trigger sentiment analysis for all top 50 coins
Measure response time (first request slower, second faster due to cache)
Measure coin detail response time

item.name: 06 - Error Handling
item.description: Test error scenarios and edge cases

request.description: Test validation - limit over 200 should be capped

exec: pm.test('Coins count capped at max (200)', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().data.length).to.be.lessThanOrEqual(200); })

request.description: Invalid sort should default to market_cap

exec: pm.test('Returns 200 with default sorting', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); })

request.description: Days over 30 should be capped

exec: pm.test('Price history capped at 30 days', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().price_history.length).to.be.lessThanOrEqual(30); })

item.name: Consistency - Store first coin from list

request.description: Store first coin for consistency check
Verify detail endpoint matches list data

exec: pm.test('Sentiment matches between list and detail', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().coin.sentiment_score).to.equal(pm.environment.get('consistency_sentiment')); });
pm.test('Symbol matches between list and detail', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().coin.symbol).to.equal(pm.environment.get('consistency_symbol')); })

item.name: 08 - MARL Competition API
item.description: Test the Phase 2 MARL competition endpoints

request.description: Start a new MARL competition and store the returned competition id for later polling.

exec: pm.test('Response includes competition metadata', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('competitionId'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('status'); pm.expect(data.status).to.equal('STARTED'); });

request.description: Poll the status of a running or completed MARL competition.

exec: pm.test('Status is 200 or 500 depending on competition state', function () { pm.expect([200, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Status payload has competition fields', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('competitionId'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('status'); pm.expect(['RUNNING', 'COMPLETED']).to.include(data.status); }); }

request.description: Fetch full MARL competition results after completion. A 202 response indicates the competition is still running.

exec: pm.test('Results request returns 200, 202, 404, or 500', function () { pm.expect([200, 202, 404, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Completed results include rankings and comparisons', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('finalRankings'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('headToHeadMetrics'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('competitorImpact'); }); }

request.description: Run a head-to-head comparison between two MARL agents.

exec: pm.test('Comparison payload has agent identifiers and win counts', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('agent1'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('agent2'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('rounds'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('agent1Wins'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('agent2Wins'); pm.expect(data.agent1Wins + data.agent2Wins).to.equal(data.rounds); });

pm.test('Comparison payload has win rates and returns', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('agent1WinRate'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('agent2WinRate'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('avgAgent1Return'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('avgAgent2Return'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('overallWinner'); pm.expect([data.agent1, data.agent2]).to.include(data.overallWinner); });

pm.test('roundDetails is an array matching rounds count with correct structure', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.roundDetails)).to.be.true; pm.expect(data.roundDetails.length).to.equal(data.rounds); data.roundDetails.forEach(function (r) { pm.expect(r).to.have.property('round'); pm.expect(r).to.have.property('winner'); pm.expect(r).to.have.property('agent1Return'); pm.expect(r).to.have.property('agent2Return'); }); });

request.description: List all known MARL competitions and their summary state.

exec: pm.test('Competition list has total and competitions', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('total'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('competitions'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.competitions)).to.be.true; });

request.description: Retrieve static MARL API and engine documentation.

exec: pm.test('Info payload documents MARL concepts', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('tournamentModes'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('riskProfiles'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('endpoints'); });

item.name: 09 - Social Media Intelligence
item.description: Test all social media endpoints: trending topics, scored items, item detail, stats, refresh, trending-score

request.description: Fetch clustered trending topics across social sources. Topics that share a coin_symbol may be grouped into one response entry.

exec: pm.test('Response has topics array', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('topics'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.topics)).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Clustered topic shape is present when topics exist', function () { var topics = pm.response.json().topics; if (topics.length > 0) { var topic = topics[0]; pm.expect(topic).to.have.property('primary_topic'); pm.expect(topic).to.have.property('cluster_size'); pm.expect(topic).to.have.property('clustered_topics'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(topic.clustered_topics)).to.be.true; } });

request.description: Fetch scored social items. If more rows exist, the response may include next_cursor for keyset pagination.

exec: pm.test('Response contains pagination metadata', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('limit'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('offset'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('items'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.items)).to.be.true; });

pm.test('next_cursor is nullable or string', function () { var nextCursor = pm.response.json().next_cursor; pm.expect(nextCursor === undefined || nextCursor === null || typeof nextCursor === 'string').to.be.true; });

request.description: Fetch next page using cursor from previous response. Only meaningful when social_items_cursor is set.
Fetch a single scored social-media item with full scoring breakdown (FinBERT, sarcasm, coin extraction).

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Item has id, platform, content, and scores', function () { var item = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(item).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(item).to.have.property('platform'); pm.expect(item).to.have.property('content'); pm.expect(item).to.have.property('sentiment_score'); }); }

request.description: Source health and fetch counters for all social media scrapers.

exec: pm.test('Stats response has sources', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('sources'); });

request.description: Trigger an immediate scrape for a single coin symbol.

exec: pm.test('Response indicates refresh triggered', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.any.keys('status', 'message', 'queued'); });

request.description: Comprehensive multi-source trend report for a coin symbol.

exec: pm.test('Response has symbol and trending data', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('symbol'); pm.expect(data.symbol).to.equal('BTC'); });

item.name: 10 - Tournament Monitor
item.description: Test all /api/tournaments/* endpoints: list, active, single, pause, resume, stop, SSE stream

request.description: List all tournaments regardless of status (RUNNING, PAUSED, COMPLETED, STOPPED, ERROR, QUEUED).

exec: pm.test('Response has tournaments array and total', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('tournaments'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('total'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.tournaments)).to.be.true; });

pm.test('Tournament objects have required fields', function () { var tournaments = pm.response.json().tournaments; if (tournaments.length > 0) { var t = tournaments[0]; pm.expect(t).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(t).to.have.property('status'); pm.expect(t).to.have.property('mode'); pm.expect(t).to.have.property('agents'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(t.agents)).to.be.true; pm.environment.set('tournament_id', t.id); } });

pm.test('Tournament status values are valid', function () { var valid = ['RUNNING','PAUSED','COMPLETED','STOPPED','ERROR','QUEUED']; pm.response.json().tournaments.forEach(function(t) { pm.expect(valid).to.include(t.status); }); });

request.description: List only RUNNING or PAUSED tournaments. Returns count badge value used by the UI tab.

exec: pm.test('All returned tournaments are RUNNING or PAUSED', function () { pm.response.json().tournaments.forEach(function(t) { pm.expect(['RUNNING', 'PAUSED']).to.include(t.status); }); });
pm.test('total matches array length', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data.total).to.equal(data.tournaments.length); });

request.description: Fetch a single tournament by ID including agent snapshots and elapsed time.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Tournament has id, status, agents, mode', function () { var t = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(t).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(t).to.have.property('status'); pm.expect(t).to.have.property('agents'); pm.expect(t).to.have.property('mode'); }); pm.test('agents is an array of AgentSnapshot objects', function () { var agents = pm.response.json().agents; pm.expect(Array.isArray(agents)).to.be.true; if (agents.length > 0) { pm.expect(agents[0]).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(agents[0]).to.have.property('equity'); } }); }

request.description: Verify 404 is returned for an unknown tournament ID.
Pause a RUNNING tournament. Returns 409 if already paused or not running.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Tournament status is now PAUSED', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().status).to.equal('PAUSED'); }); }
if (pm.response.code === 409) { pm.test('Conflict error has message', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().error).to.be.a('string'); }); }

request.description: Resume a PAUSED tournament. Returns 409 if not currently paused.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Tournament status is now RUNNING', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().status).to.equal('RUNNING'); }); }

request.description: Stop a tournament permanently. Returns 409 if already in a terminal state (STOPPED/COMPLETED/ERROR).

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Tournament status is now STOPPED', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().status).to.equal('STOPPED'); }); }

request.description: Server-Sent Events stream for a tournament. Emits 'stats' (every 5s), 'status' (on change), and 'heartbeat' (every 30s) events. Auto-closes on terminal states. NOTE: SSE cannot be fully tested in Postman — use a browser or EventSource client.

exec: pm.test('Content-Type is text/event-stream or 404 for missing tournament', function () { if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.expect(pm.response.headers.get('Content-Type')).to.include('text/event-stream'); } else { pm.expect([404]).to.include(pm.response.code); } });

item.name: 11 - MARL Extended
item.description: Additional MARL endpoints: equity curves, trade log, SSE stream, agent learning, coin universe, pretrain, algorithm

request.description: Live equity curve snapshots per agent for a running or completed competition.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Response has snapshots array', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('snapshots'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.snapshots)).to.be.true; }); }

request.description: Per-agent trade summary for a competition.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Trade log has entries', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.have.property('trades'); }); }

request.description: SSE stream of competition events (tick updates, final results). NOTE: Use browser EventSource for full testing.
List all agent learning states (Q-tables / policy weights) stored in SQLite.

exec: pm.test('Response has agents array', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('agents'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.agents)).to.be.true; });

request.description: Reset an agent's persisted learning state. Irreversible — the agent starts fresh next competition.
Preview AUTO coin selection — shows which symbols would be picked for the next competition.

exec: pm.test('Coin universe has symbols array', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('symbols'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.symbols)).to.be.true; pm.expect(data.symbols.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });

request.description: Pre-train an agent on synthetic market data. Additive — safe to call multiple times; learning continues from prior state.

exec: pm.test('Convergence curve is returned', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('convergenceCurve'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.convergenceCurve)).to.be.true; });

request.description: Declare the learning algorithm for an agent (Q_LEARNING, POLICY_GRADIENT, etc.).

item.name: 12 - MARL Broker / Real Trading
item.description: Broker credential management and real-money trading endpoints. Requires BROKER_MASTER_KEY env var.

request.description: Store broker credentials encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Requires BROKER_MASTER_KEY to be set.

exec: pm.test('Returns 201 or 500 (500 if BROKER_MASTER_KEY not set)', function () { pm.expect([201, 500]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
if (pm.response.code === 201) { pm.test('Credential ID returned', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.have.property('id'); pm.environment.set('credential_id', pm.response.json().id); }); }

request.description: List stored credential metadata. Secrets are never returned.
Unauthenticated endpoint for the frontend credential dropdown. Returns minimal { id, label, provider, mode } shape.

exec: pm.test('Picker response is an array', function () { pm.expect(Array.isArray(pm.response.json())).to.be.true; });

request.description: Decrypt credentials and connect the exchange adapter. Required before starting a PAPER/LIVE competition.
List all currently connected exchange adapters.
Retrieve the order audit trail for a real-trading competition.
Remove stored broker credential by ID.
Cancel all open orders for a competition immediately. Use in emergencies.

item.name: 13 - Agent Management
item.description: Test all /api/agents/* endpoints: list, leaderboard, single, customize, retire, history, genome, genealogy

request.description: Paginated list of all registered agents.

exec: pm.test('Response has agents array and total', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('agents'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('total'); pm.expect(Array.isArray(data.agents)).to.be.true; });

request.description: Top agents ranked by win rate. Must be registered before /api/agents/:id to avoid wildcard swallowing.

exec: pm.test('Leaderboard entries have rank and win_rate', function () { var leaders = pm.response.json(); if (leaders.length > 0) { pm.expect(leaders[0]).to.have.property('win_rate'); } });

request.description: Full agent profile including cosmetics, genome summary, and statistics.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Agent has id, name, riskProfile, and statistics', function () { var a = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(a).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(a).to.have.property('name'); pm.expect(a).to.have.property('riskProfile'); }); }

request.description: Update agent cosmetics (name, emoji, color, bio). Does not affect trading behaviour.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Updated agent returned', function () { var a = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(a.name).to.equal('Apex Trader'); pm.expect(a.emoji).to.equal('🦅'); }); }

request.description: Manually retire an underperforming agent. Retired agents are excluded from future competitions.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Agent status is retired', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.have.any.keys('retired', 'status', 'message'); }); }

request.description: Competition history for a specific agent.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('History is an array', function () { pm.expect(Array.isArray(pm.response.json())).to.be.true; }); }

request.description: Retrieve the full genome (risk tolerance, learning rate, discount factor, etc.) for an agent.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Genome has numeric parameters', function () { var g = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(g).to.have.any.keys('riskTolerance', 'learningRate', 'discountFactor', 'explorationRate'); }); }

request.description: Ancestry tree for an agent — shows parent and grandparent lineage from evolutionary breeding.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Genealogy response has agentId', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.have.property('agentId'); }); }

item.name: 14 - Evolutionary System
item.description: Test evolutionary tournament endpoints: start, breed, list, detail, summary, and evolution history/genome/population

request.description: Start a new multi-generation evolutionary tournament.

exec: pm.test('Tournament ID and status returned', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('tournamentId'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('status'); pm.environment.set('evolutionary_tournament_id', data.tournamentId); });

request.description: List all evolutionary tournaments with their generation counts.
Full status and generation history for one evolutionary tournament.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Response has id, status, and generations', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('status'); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('generations'); }); }

request.description: Aggregate tournament history for dashboards — best fitness, avg generations, population trends.

exec: pm.test('Summary has tournament stats', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.any.keys('totalTournaments', 'bestFitness', 'averageGenerations'); });

request.description: Create mutated children from selected parent agents via genetic crossover.
All evolutionary tournament generations with fitness stats.
Genome of the highest-fitness agent ever produced across all evolutionary tournaments.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Best genome has fitness score', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.have.property('fitnessScore'); }); }

request.description: Current population of the most recent evolutionary tournament.

exec: pm.test('Population is an array of agent entries', function () { pm.expect(Array.isArray(pm.response.json())).to.be.true; });

item.name: 15 - Trading
item.description: Live / paper exchange trading endpoints via TradingService safety guards

request.description: Connection state, provider name, and exchange mode (PAPER/SANDBOX/LIVE).

exec: pm.test('Status has provider and mode', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.any.keys('provider', 'mode', 'connected'); });

request.description: Latest price from the active exchange for a symbol.

exec: pm.test('Price is a positive number', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.property('price'); pm.expect(data.price).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(data.price).to.be.greaterThan(0); });

request.description: All non-zero balances on the active exchange.
Place an order via TradingService safety guards (kill switch, max positions, position size cap, $1 min notional).
Capital, PnL, and trade counts for the current session.

exec: pm.test('Stats has capital and pnl fields', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.any.keys('capital', 'pnl', 'totalTrades', 'tradeCount'); });

item.name: 16 - Admin Config
item.description: Runtime configuration management. Masked secrets, PATCH to set, DELETE to clear.

request.description: Return all config rows. Secret values are masked (shown as *****).

exec: pm.test('Config is an array or object', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data !== null && data !== undefined).to.be.true; });

request.description: Set a single runtime config value by key.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Updated config entry returned', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.have.any.keys('key', 'updated', 'message'); }); }

request.description: Clear a config value. The key remains but the value is set to null.
Run a backtest simulation. Returns a testId for polling results.

exec: pm.test('Test ID returned', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.any.keys('testId', 'id'); pm.environment.set('backtest_id', data.testId || data.id); });

request.description: Retrieve full backtest simulation details by test ID.

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { pm.test('Backtest results have pnl and trades', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.any.keys('pnl', 'totalReturn', 'trades', 'equity'); }); }

item.name: 18 - Miscellaneous Endpoints
item.description: Sentiment analysis, rankings, info, scrape ingestion, trending, and agent configure

request.description: Run on-demand sentiment analysis in one of 4 modes: BASIC, ADVANCED, TRADING_SIGNALS, SMART.

exec: pm.test('Analysis result has score and confidence', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.any.keys('sentiment', 'score', 'confidence', 'sentiment_score'); });

request.description: Rank coins by composite smart-sentiment score.
Documentation: available analysis modes, agent types, and risk profiles.

exec: pm.test('Modes documented', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.any.keys('analysisModes', 'modes', 'agentTypes', 'riskProfiles'); });

request.description: Return currently trending topics across all data sources.

exec: pm.test('Response has trending data', function () { var data = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(data).to.have.any.keys('trending', 'topics', 'data'); });

request.description: Manually push ScrapedPost objects into the trending pipeline.
Scrape one symbol from all configured social platforms immediately.
Scrape multiple symbols from social platforms in one request.
Register and configure trading agents before starting a competition.
